overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of traversing a snowy mountain glacier with ice crevasses and distant peaks under a clear blue sky. The player character walks across the snowfield, occasionally panning to reveal expansive valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered glacier slope with visible ice crevasses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snowfield toward the main summit

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peak dominating the horizon
uneven snow and ice surface with texture and crevasses
deep blue ice cracks visible in the snow surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking across a vast snow-covered glacier. The main summit peak looms ahead in the distance while blue ice crevasses are visible in the snow. The sky is clear and blue with bright direct sunlight.

events.description: camera pans sharply right to reveal expansive valley view

agents.ego_description: turning to survey the surrounding mountain landscape and valley below

entered.detail: deep valley with snow-covered slopes extending into the distance
range of snow-capped peaks visible across the valley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal a breathtaking view of a deep mountain valley with distant snow-capped peaks. The main summit temporarily exits the frame as the player surveys the expansive alpine landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowfield with multiple peak views

events.description: camera turns right to focus on secondary peak

agents.ego_description: traversing the snowfield while scanning the surrounding peaks

entered.detail: main summit reappears on the left side of the frame
distinctive snow-covered peak visible to the right

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the snowfield, the main summit re-enters the frame from the left while a secondary peak becomes visible on the right. The camera moves steadily forward with occasional pans to survey the mountainous terrain.

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the main summit, looking up at the steep snow slopes

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the main summit, which grows larger and more detailed as the camera moves closer. The steep snow-covered ridges and ice formations become clearly visible as the player ascends toward the peak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a vast glacier that gradually narrows as the camera ascends toward a towering mountain summit. It begins with a steady walk across a bright, sunlit snowfield marked by deep blue ice crevasses, with the main peak looming in the far distance under a clear blue sky. As the camera pans right, the view expands to reveal a breathtaking deep mountain valley and distant snow-capped peaks before turning back toward the path. The scene then shifts as the main summit re-enters the frame from the left and a secondary peak emerges on the right, with the camera continuing its forward momentum across the alpine terrain. Finally, the perspective closes in on the main summit, which grows larger and more detailed as the camera climbs toward the steep snow-covered ridges and jagged ice formations of the peak.
